message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber

participant "halon" as halon
participant "ios1" as ios1
participant "ios2" as ios2
participant "client" as client

box "SNS operation start" #LightGray
  note right of halon: notification [(pool, repair), (disk, repair)]
  
  rect "loop [until all ios are ready]" #White
    halon -> ios2 : repair status request
    ios2 --> halon : repair status reply
  end
  
  halon -> ios2 : spiel_repair_start
end

note right of halon: repair process

alt "sucessful case"
  ios1 -> halon : notify [(pool, repaired), (disk, repaired)]
  
  box "SNS status query" #LightGray
    rect "loop [unil all ios are in IDLE]" #White
      halon -> ios2 : repair status request
      ios2 --> halon : repair status reply [IDLE, IDLE]
    end
    
    halon -> client : notify [(pool, REPAIRED), (disk, REPAIRED)]
  end
else "partial repair"
  ios1 -> halon : notify [(pool, repair), (disk, repair)]
  note right of halon: Abort SNS operation
else "transient disk"
  ios1 -> halon : notify [(disk, transient)]
  note right of halon: Pause SNS operation
else "failed disk"
  ios1 -> halon : notify [(disk, failed)]
  note right of halon: Abort SNS operation
end

@enduml
```
